details: The agent navigated to the GitHub repository and then fetched the raw Makefile content from raw.githubusercontent.com. The snapshot clearly shows VERSION = 7 and PATCHLEVEL = 0 in the actual file content. The agent correctly reported these values along with additional context (SUBLEVEL = 0, EXTRAVERSION = -rc7, NAME = Baby Opossum Posse). The data was read from the actual page, not hallucinated.
